name: slack-post
description: Post a message to a Slack channel using the Slack Web API. Supports markdown formatting and optional thread replies.

inputs.name: channel
inputs.description: Slack channel ID (e.g. 'C01ABCDEF') or channel name (e.g. '#general')

inputs.name: threadTs
inputs.description: Thread timestamp to reply in a thread

outputs.name: ts
outputs.description: Message timestamp (can be used for threading)

outputs.name: channel
outputs.description: Channel the message was posted to
